prompt: Minimalist geometric logo mark for 'LetAtlas' — a premium AI company. Stylized Atlas titan figure in an elegant kneeling pose, holding up or supporting a glowing sphere. Deep navy blue #1B3A5C and metallic gold #C9A84C on transparent background. Clean vector-style silhouette, smooth curves, modern tech aesthetic. No text whatsoever. Simple enough to work as a favicon at 32px and a billboard. Think Anthropic/Stripe level design sophistication.
